g.text: Non-fatal per-module: a failing module is disabled and skipped in later phases; daemon continues with remaining healthy modules
1. Load config (butler.toml) — skip if pre-injected (e.g. test fixtures)
1b. Configure structured logging (level, format, log_root, butler_name)
1c. Initialize blob storage (LocalBlobStore at configured blob_storage_dir)
2.5. Detect inline secrets in config (detect_secrets) — logs warnings
3. Load all modules via registry.load_all() → topological sort (Kahn's algorithm)
5. Validate butler.env credentials (env-only fast-fail; non-secret config only)
6. Provision database: Database.from_env() → schema → provision() → connect()
7b. Run butler-specific migrations if chain exists (has_butler_chain(name))
8. Run module Alembic migrations (non-fatal per-module; failures disable module)
8b. Build CredentialStore (layered local+shared); validate module creds (non-fatal)
8d. Bootstrap owner entity in shared.entities (idempotent; non-fatal)
9. Call module on_startup() in topological order (non-fatal; failures disable module)
10. Create Spawner with runtime adapter; verify binary on PATH (fatal if missing)
10a. Set up audit pool for daemon-side audit logging
11. Sync TOML schedules to DB via sync_schedules(pool, schedules, stagger_key)
11b. Open MCP client connection to Switchboard (non-switchboard butlers only)
12. Create FastMCP server instance and register core tools
13b. Apply approval gates to configured gated tools
13c. Wire calendar overlap-approval enqueuer (when calendar + approvals both loaded)
13d. Initialize module runtime states (enabled/disabled) from state store
14. Start FastMCP SSE server on configured port (_start_mcp_server)
14b. Start durable buffer workers and scanner (switchboard only)
14c. Recover unprocessed route_inbox rows as background task (non-switchboard)
15. Launch switchboard heartbeat loop (non-switchboard butlers only)
16. Start internal scheduler loop (asyncio.create_task; fires tick() every tick_interval_s)
17. Start liveness reporter loop (POST heartbeat to Switchboard, all butlers)
S1. Stop MCP server (server.should_exit = True; await server_task; close socket)
S2. Stop durable buffer (drain remaining queue, cancel workers/scanner)
S2b. Cancel in-flight route_inbox background tasks (rows remain in DB for recovery)
S3. Stop accepting new triggers; drain in-flight runtime sessions (with timeout)
S5b. Cancel scheduler loop (wait for in-progress tick() to finish)
S6. Module on_shutdown() in REVERSE topological order (active modules only)
S7. Close audit DB pool (if separate)
S8. Close credential-layer DB pools (shared credentials DB)
